title: Filipino-Style Toasted Bread with Mirin Glaze
description: A sweet and indulgent breakfast or snack inspired by Filipino cuisine, featuring toasted bread topped with a mixture of honey and mirin.
instructions: Preheat a toaster or oven to 350°F (175°C).
Toast the bread until lightly browned.
In a small saucepan, combine honey, mirin, and hon. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture has thickened slightly.
Brush the honey-mirin glaze over the toasted bread.
If desired, sprinkle with glassy sugar or syrup.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Best enjoyed within a few hours of preparation.
